title: 189 Combat Engagements in 24 Hours; Russia Fires 8,409 Kamikaze Drones
detail: Ukraine's General Staff reported 189 combat engagements over the past 24 hours on April 29 — one of the highest daily totals of 2026. Russian forces deployed 8,409 kamikaze drones, conducted 84 airstrikes dropping 234 guided aerial bombs, and fired 3,019 rounds of artillery at Ukrainian positions and populated areas. Ukrainian air defense intercepted 154 of 171 drones used in overnight attacks (90% interception rate). President Zelensky disclosed that Russia had fired approximately 1,900 attack drones, nearly 1,400 guided aerial bombs, and around 60 missiles at Ukraine over the past week alone. The Ukrainian General Staff reported Russian total personnel losses since February 24, 2022 exceeded 1,328,820, including 1,180 over the previous day. Ukraine's sustained air defense performance and drone counter-campaign have significantly degraded Russian strategic strike capacity.

media.caption: 189 combat engagements in 24 hours; Russia deploys 8,409 drones across Ukraine

title: Zelensky Reveals Russia's Response to Ceasefire Proposal as War Enters Week 1,526
detail: President Volodymyr Zelensky disclosed to US officials how Russia had responded to Ukraine's ceasefire proposal, describing Moscow's position as evasive and conditions-laden. Ukraine has consistently proposed a comprehensive ceasefire leading to a just peace with binding security guarantees, while Russia has insisted on terms that would effectively ratify its territorial gains and neutralize Ukraine's NATO aspirations. Lt. Gen. Kyrylo Budanov, former head of military intelligence and now Zelensky's top aide, reaffirmed: 'We are definitely not losing.' The day marked 1,526 days since Russia's full-scale invasion of February 24, 2022. Ukraine's Atlantic Council-published drone campaign analysis concluded Ukraine is winning the drone war despite the enormous Russian assault volume, citing increasingly deep strikes on Russian industrial and energy infrastructure.

media.caption: Zelensky reveals Russia's response to ceasefire proposal as full-scale war enters day 1,526
